code: import axios from'axios';const api=axios.create({baseURL:'/api'});api.interceptors.request.use(cfg=>{const t=localStorage.getItem('gs_token');if(t)cfg.headers.Authorization=`Bearer ${t}`;return cfg;});api.interceptors.response.use(r=>r,err=>{var _err$response;if(((_err$response=err.response)===null||_err$response===void 0?void 0:_err$response.status)===401){localStorage.removeItem('gs_token');window.location.href='/';}return Promise.reject(err);});export const authAPI={register:d=>api.post('/auth/register',d),login:d=>api.post('/auth/login',d),adminLogin:d=>api.post('/auth/admin/login',d),me:()=>api.get('/auth/me')};export const policyAPI={plans:()=>api.get('/policies/plans'),addPlan:data=>api.post('/policies/plans',data),active:()=>api.get('/policies/active'),my:()=>api.get('/policies/my'),buy:planId=>api.post('/policies',{planId}),cancel:()=>api.delete('/policies/active'),toggleAutoRenew:autoRenew=>api.patch('/policies/active/autorenew',{autoRenew})};export const claimsAPI={my:()=>api.get('/claims/my'),all:()=>api.get('/claims'),approve:id=>api.post(`/claims/${id}/approve`),reject:(id,reason)=>api.post(`/claims/${id}/reject`,{reason}),manual:data=>api.post(`/claims/manual`,data)};export const dashAPI={worker:()=>api.get('/dashboard/worker'),admin:()=>api.get('/dashboard/admin')};export const triggerAPI={recent:()=>api.get('/triggers/recent'),simulate:type=>api.post('/triggers/simulate',{type})};export const workerAPI={zones:()=>api.get('/workers/zones'),riskProfile:()=>api.get('/workers/risk-profile'),updateProfile:d=>api.patch('/workers/profile',d),clearNotifications:()=>api.post('/workers/notifications/read')};export const walletAPI={balance:()=>api.get('/wallet/balance'),transactions:function(){let limit=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:50;return api.get(`/wallet/transactions?limit=${limit}`);},add:d=>api.post('/wallet/add',d),withdraw:d=>api.post('/wallet/withdraw',d)};export default api;
